ov_overview_body.en: Walibi Netherlands — officially known as Walibi Holland — is the Netherlands' most thrilling and celebrated theme park, a spectacular 140-hectare destination located in Biddinghuizen in the flat polder landscape of Flevoland, approximately one hour from Amsterdam by car. Originally established in 1971 as the educational Flevohof agricultural park before transforming into an amusement destination in 1992 under the Walibi Group, the park subsequently became Six Flags Holland in 2000 before returning to the Walibi brand under Compagnie des Alpes ownership in 2010. Today Walibi Netherlands is home to one of the finest collections of roller coasters of any medium-sized European theme park — a lineup that has been dramatically elevated since 2018 by a bold Festivalization transformation and a series of world-class investments. The undisputed centrepiece is Untamed — a Rocky Mountain Construction hybrid coaster built on the structure of the former Robin Hood wooden coaster, widely regarded as one of the best RMC coasters on the planet, delivering 14 airtime moments and 5 inversions at 92 km/h. Goliath remains the tallest coaster in the Netherlands at 47 metres and 107 km/h. Lost Gravity was a prototype Mack Rides coaster when it opened in 2016. Xpress: Platform 13 launches riders to 5G in 2.8 seconds. Condor was the world's first Suspended Looping Coaster. New in 2025: YoY — Europe's tallest, steepest and fastest duelling coaster from RMC. Walibi Village offers comfortable cottage accommodation just 200 metres from the park entrance.

ov_did_you_know_body.en: Walibi Netherlands began life in 1971 as the Flevohof — an agricultural and educational exhibition park in the newly reclaimed polder land of Flevoland. The park was acquired by the Walibi Group in 1992 and renamed Walibi Flevo, then became Six Flags Holland in 2000 under American ownership before returning to Compagnie des Alpes as Walibi Holland in 2010. Condor, which opened in 1994, was the world's very first Suspended Looping Coaster — a landmark in coaster engineering that spawned dozens of clones worldwide. Untamed, which opened in 2019, was transformed from the beloved Robin Hood wooden coaster which had operated since 1995. The park hosts two major music festivals on its adjacent grounds each year — Defqon.1 and Lowlands — which attract tens of thousands of visitors to the Biddinghuizen area. The park's Festivalization transformation beginning in 2018 introduced street art, food trucks and festival culture throughout the park creating a uniquely Dutch urban vibe unlike any other European theme park. YoY, opened in 2025, holds the record as Europe's tallest, steepest and fastest duelling coaster.

ov_plan_body.en: Arrive at opening and go straight to Untamed — it consistently draws the longest queues of any ride in the park and is best experienced within the first 30 minutes. Then Goliath, then Lost Gravity before the midday rush. Xpress: Platform 13 queues are manageable throughout the day. YoY is best tackled after lunch when the opening rush subsides. Merlin's Magic Castle is ideal for families with young children — use it as a break between the major coasters. Crazy River and El Rio Grande are perfect for warm afternoons. Cock-A-Doodle-Doo and La Hacienda are the best food options — aim for 11:30am or after 1:30pm to avoid peak rush. Download the Walibi app for live wait times. Fast Lane passes are available and strongly recommended on busy summer weekends. Tuesday and Wednesday tend to be quieter than weekends. Walibi Village is the best overnight option — book well in advance for summer dates.
ov_plan_body.es: Llega a la apertura y ve directamente a Untamed. Luego Goliath y Lost Gravity antes de la avalancha del mediodia. YoY es mejor despues del almuerzo. Merlin's Magic Castle es ideal para familias con ninos pequenos. Crazy River y El Rio Grande son perfectas para tardes calidas. Cock-A-Doodle-Doo y La Hacienda son las mejores opciones de comida. Descarga la app de Walibi para tiempos de espera en vivo. Walibi Village es la mejor opcion de alojamiento.

ov_photos_body.en: Untamed photographed from below during its most intense inversion section is one of the most dramatic roller coaster images in the Netherlands. Goliath towering over the flat Flevoland polder landscape against the open Dutch sky creates classic hypercoaster photography. Lost Gravity's unique first drop photographed from the lakeside viewing area is stunning. The street art murals throughout the Festivalization zones create vibrant and colourful photography backdrops unlike any other Dutch theme park. Merlin's Magic Castle exterior at dusk with warm lighting is beautifully atmospheric. Walibi Village cottages among the trees photographed in evening light create charming accommodation imagery.

Goliath dominando el paisaje plano de Flevoland crea fotografia clasica de hypercoaster. Los murales de arte callejero crean coloridos fondos fotograficos unicos. Walibi Village al atardecer crea imagenes encantadoras.
ov_photos_body.fr: Untamed photographie depuis le bas pendant sa section d'inversions est l'une des images de coaster les plus dramatiques des Pays-Bas. Goliath dominant le paysage plat du polder Flevoland cree une photographie classique d'hypercoaster. Les murales de street art creent des fonds photographiques colores uniques. Walibi Village au crepuscule cree des images charmantes.
ov_photos_body.de: Untamed von unten fotografiert wahrend seines intensivsten Inversionsabschnitts ist eines der dramatischsten Achterbahn-Bilder in den Niederlanden. Goliath uber der flachen Flevoland-Pollandschaft thronend schafft klassische Hypercoaster-Fotografie. Die Strassenkunst-Wandmalereien schaffen bunte und farbenfrohe Fotohintergurunde. Walibi Village in der Abenddammerung schafft charmante Unterkunftsbilder.
ov_photos_body.it: Untamed fotografato dal basso durante la sua sezione di inversioni piu intensa e una delle immagini di coaster piu drammatiche nei Paesi Bassi. Goliath che domina il paesaggio pianeggiante del polder Flevoland crea fotografia classica di hypercoaster. I murales di street art creano sfondi fotografici colorati unici. Walibi Village al crepuscolo crea immagini di alloggio incantevoli.
ov_photos_body.nl: Untamed van onderaf gefotografeerd tijdens zijn meest intense inversiedeel is een van de meest dramatische achtbaanbeelden in Nederland. Goliath die boven het vlakke Flevolandse polderlandschap uittorent creert klassieke hypercoaster fotografie. De street art muurschilderingen creeren kleurrijke en levendige fotografische achtergronden. Walibi Village cottages in avondlicht creeren charmante accommodatiebeelden.
ov_photos_body.pt: Untamed fotografado de baixo durante a sua secao de inversoes mais intensa e uma das imagens de coaster mais dramaticas da Holanda. Goliath dominando a paisagem plana do polder Flevoland cria fotografia classica de hypercoaster. Os murais de street art criam fundos fotograficos coloridos unicos. As casas de Walibi Village ao anoitecer criam imagens de alojamento encantadoras.
ov_photos_body.ru: Untamed, сфотографированный снизу во время наиболее интенсивной секции инверсий — один из самых драматичных образов горок в Нидерландах. Goliath, возвышающийся над плоским польдерным ландшафтом Флеволанда, создаёт классическую фотографию гиперкоастера. Стрит-арт муралы создают яркие и красочные фотографические фоны. Домики Walibi Village в вечернем свете создают очаровательные изображения.
ov_photos_body.zh: 从下方拍摄狂野无羁最强烈的翻转区段是荷兰最戏剧性的过山车图像之一。巨兽俯瞰弗莱福兰平坦圩田景观对荷兰开阔天空创造了经典的超级过山车摄影。节庆化区域的街头艺术壁画创造了独特的色彩丰富的摄影背景。瓦利比村小屋在暮色中的拍摄创造了迷人的住宿图像。
ov_photos_body.ar: Untamed الملتقط من الاسفل اثناء قسمه الانعكاسي الاكثر كثافة هو واحد من اكثر صور الاوتوستراد درامية في هولندا. Goliath يطغى على المنظر الطبيعي المسطح لبولدر Flevoland خلق تصوير hypercoaster كلاسيكي. جداريات الفن الشارعي تخلق خلفيات فوتوغرافية ملونة وحيوية. بيوت Walibi Village في الضوء المسائي تخلق صور اقامة ساحرة.
